description: Send notifications to your own Twilio destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise twilio:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a Twilio Messages API form body and post it to api.twilio.com (no Apprise).
name: msg-to-twilio_sms

request.template: {"urls":"twilio://${ customer_secrets.TWILIO_SMS_ACCOUNT_SID }:${ customer_secrets.TWILIO_SMS_AUTH_TOKEN }@${ customer_secrets.TWILIO_SMS_FROM_PHONE }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"twilio://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.account_sid_secret }} }:${ customer_secrets.{{ params.auth_token_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.from_phone_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

To=${ customer_secrets.TWILIO_SMS_TO }&From=${ customer_secrets.TWILIO_SMS_FROM }&Body={* _escape_uri(((_body.title or "") .. ((_body.title and _body.title ~= "" and _body.body and _body.body ~= "") and ": " or "") .. (_body.body or ""))) *}

To=${ customer_secrets.TWILIO_SMS_TO }&From=${ customer_secrets.TWILIO_SMS_FROM }&Body={* _escape_uri(((_body.title or "") .. ((_body.title and _body.title ~= "" and _body.body and _body.body ~= "") and ": " or "") .. (_body.body or ""))) *}
